finalized_plan.description: Use a web search tool to locate Federico Lauria’s 2014 dissertation from an academic repository or digital archive
Once located, retrieve the dissertation text and use a text-search tool to navigate to footnote 397
Extract the full bibliographic information for the cited work provided in footnote 397
Identify the cited work’s structure (such as its table of contents) to extract the chapter titles and associated chapter numbers
Use the Smithsonian American Art Museum’s online collection to search for paintings whose titles derive from the identified chapter titles
Match the chapter titles from the cited work with the painting titles found in the museum’s collection, and determine the corresponding chapter numbers
Compute the absolute difference between these two chapter numbers
Compile the final answer in the required format including a short outcome, an extremely detailed explanation, and additional context

root_cause_reasoning: The agent failed to retrieve the original paper. It should visit the original paper link instead of the Hugging Face dataset
notes: Controversial! The Hugging Face page may have contained the relevant information, but the link is now broken, so this cannot be confirmed.
